message:
feat(http): expand HTTP/1.1 server with enhanced request handling

Major enhancements to HTTP server infrastructure:

http/h1/server.rs (+106 lines):
- Expand request handling capabilities
- Add new response generation helpers
- Improve connection management
- Enhanced error handling and recovery

http/h1/listener.rs:
- Update listener configuration options
- Improve accept loop handling

service/rate_limit.rs (+31 lines):
- Expand rate limiting functionality
- Add new rate limiting strategies
- Improve token bucket implementation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
